name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Nexa
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) a Nexa RF remote code to a remote transmitter.

config_entries.label: Level
config_entries.description: The Nexa level code to send, see dumper output for more info.

config_entries.label: Channel
config_entries.description: The Nexa channel code to send, see dumper output for more info.

config_entries.label: Device
config_entries.description: The Nexa device code to send, see dumper output for more info.

config_entries.label: Group
config_entries.description: The Nexa group code to send, see dumper output for more info.

config_entries.label: State
config_entries.description: The Nexa state code to send (0-OFF, 1-ON, 2-DIMMER LEVEL), see dumper output for more info.
